description: Config file for the hadolint Dockerfile linter (.hadolint.yaml / .hadolint.yml). Keys mirror the schema documented at https://github.com/hadolint/hadolint#configure; hadolint has no officially published JSON Schema of its own.

disable-ignore-pragma.description: Disable the `# hadolint ignore=DLxxxx` inline pragma

failure-threshold.description: Minimum severity that causes a non-zero exit code

label-schema.description: Required label keys and their expected value format

override.description: Reassign rule codes to a different severity level

trustedRegistries.description: Registries allowed in FROM instructions without warning

title: hadolint configuration file
